lead: I'm a Software Development Engineer building full-stack web applications and modern app solutions.
paragraphs: I work across front-end, back-end, APIs, and database schema design to build clean, scalable, and maintainable products.
I have developed multiple full-stack projects and bring leadership, adaptability, teamwork, and ownership to every project.
As a team lead, I focus on clear communication, practical planning, and smooth project execution.
